title: sison costatus
intro: Sison costatus, also known as Sichuan lovage or wild angelica, is a type of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae. It is native to the mountainous regions of Sichuan, China, and is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Sison costatus include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Sison costatus can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions, including fever, coughs, and respiratory issues.
